title: ControlTest
description: Audit-grade test definition for a Control: what kind of effectiveness is being tested, on what cadence, with what method, sample size, pass criteria and required evidence object IDs. Per-execution results are recorded against this definition (out of scope for this schema). Top-level shape may be a single record or an array of records.

control_id.description: Control.id that this test is exercising.

sample_size.description: Number of population items the tester will examine. Optional, required only when method = sample_and_verify.

pass_criteria.description: Plain-language criteria that ALL must hold for the test to pass.

evidence_required.description: EvidenceObject IDs the tester MUST cite to support the result.

rationale.description: Why this method + cadence + sample size is appropriate (cite the clause/framework that drives it).

assurance_level.description: Target assurance produced by this test when it passes.
